replies.msg:
"Yeah. I watched the video and that cop is toast. Sure, the girl that got shot was trying to stab another kid, had a knife in her hand and had the other kid up against a car when she got shot but the bottom line is that the cop used deadly force as a first option and probably did so because he was dealing with blacks instead of rich white people. Did the cop tell her to drop the knife? Not that I saw! Did he try to understand why she felt the need to act aggressively to the other kid? Nope, not at all. How did the cop know she wasn't just trying to hug it out with her friend and that the knife was just in her hand by mistake? He didn't know and he murdered her!!!

I mean, seriously, why were the cops even there? What's a little head stompin' and stabbin' between friends? If the cops just let this go, as they should have, the kids would have just bumped fists, peaced out and gone their way but they can't do that because some trigger happy cop had to intervene."
係咁
